features: Universal Laptop Charger: AC Input: 100-240V 50/60Hz, DC Output: 16V / 18.5V / 19V / 19.5V / 20V, USB C Output: 5V / 9V / 12V / 15V 3A, 20V 2.25A, 3.25A, 4.5A, 90W,60W,45W. Not compatible with devices’ power higher than 90W.

Wide Compatibility: The Basicvolt laptop power supply contains 16 optional tips, Using one laptop charger to power laptops from different brands, including Dell Vostro 14 15 XPS 11 12 13 9350 9360 9365 9370 Inspiron 11 12 13 14 15 17 Latitude 12 7202 13 3379 7350 14 E5450, HP Pavilion G4 G6 G7 G42 G50 G71 ENVY 14-1100 17-1100 Compaq 6510B 6515B 6720T 6730B 6730S EliteBook 745 G2 820 G1 840 G1 850 G1 Probook 4420S 4430S 4440S 4510S Ideapad Flex 2 3 14 15 Yoga 11 11S 13 ThinkPad L440 L450 L540 Thinkpad Edge E431 E440 E450 E455 G500 G505 G510 G410 etc.

Working for Asus X540 X540S X540L X553 X553S Zenbook UX305 UX305LA UX21A UX32A Q302L Q304U S200E C202SA C300SA E402WA, Acer Chromebook 11 13 14 15 CB3 CB5 C720 C720P Aspire E5 E1 R3 R7 S3 V3 V5 V7 V15 D150 D250 D255 SF113-31 SF114-31 AO1-131 AO1-431, Satellite C55 C55D C55T C655 C675 C855 L55 L655 L675 L745 L755 L855 P755 P855 P875 Portege Z30 Z930 Z830, Sony Vaio PCGA-AC19V VGP-AC19V43 VGP-AC19V44 VGP etc.
USB C Laptop Adapter: With a universal Type-C interface, this laptop ac dc power adapter charges laptops with special interfaces but also charges other computer devices with Type-C interfaces.

Safe & Stable: The 90W laptop charger has built-in IC chip technology prevents overcurrent, short circuit, and internal overheating, and also this dc laptop adapter is certified by CE/FCC/RoHS to ensure safe and reliable operation. If any questions about product, please contact us at any time, we will reply within 24H.
description: Product Description Basicvolt 90W Universal Laptop Charger for HP Dell Acer Asus Lenovo Toshiba Samsung Sony Notebooks Product specifications: Input: AC 100-240V, 50/60Hz Output: 1. USB Type C Output: 5V / 9V / 12V / 15V 3A, 20V 2.25A, 3.25A, 4.5A 2. Other Plugs Output: 16V / 18.5V / 19V / 20V 3. Power: 90W 65W 45W (Not compatible with devices’ voltage higher than 90W) Pre-purchase reminder: 1. Please check the rated voltage, current and power on the bottom of your laptop. 2. Please make sure the voltage, current and power are correct before purchase. 3. Please make sure the specification of the DC connection meets your requirements. 90W Portable Laptop Power Supply Features 16 Detach Tips With 16 DC connectors included, you can easily connect and power up your various devices without any hassle. Say goodbye to carrying multiple chargers and streamline your charging experience. 3 Pin Connectors The 3 pin connector ensures a secure connection, preventing any interruptions during charging. Simply plug in the appropriate connector to match your device's charging port, and enjoy fast and efficient charging without any disruptions or loose connections. Safety Protection The 90W laptop charger, incorporating built-in IC chip technology and certified to CE/FCC/RoHS standards, delivers premium safety with overcurrent, short-circuit, and thermal overload protection, do not worry charging safety. Tip's Spec. and Applicable Laptop Models ("Ctrl + F" to find your models or tip size.
